mapper.sql: FROM PRODUCT_FAVORITE pf JOIN PRODUCT p ON p.PRD_SN = pf.PRD_SN JOIN AUCTION a ON a.PRD_SN = p.PRD_SN JOIN CATEGORY c ON c.CAT_SN = p.CAT_SN JOIN USERS u ON u.USR_SN = p.USR_SN LEFT JOIN CMM_CODE aucStatus ON aucStatus.CMM_CD = a.AUC_STATUS_CD LEFT JOIN CMM_CODE tradeMethod ON tradeMethod.CMM_CD = p.PRD_TRD_METHOD_CD LEFT JOIN ( SELECT pi.PRD_SN, CONCAT(f.FL_PATH, '/', f.FL_SAVE_NM) AS THUMBNAIL_PATH FROM PRODUCT_IMAGE pi JOIN FILES f ON f.FL_SN = pi.FL_SN AND f.FL_USE_YN = 'Y' JOIN ( SELECT PRD_SN, MIN(CASE WHEN PRD_IMG_RPRS_YN = 'Y' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END * 100000 + PRD_IMG_SORT_NO) AS SORT_KEY FROM PRODUCT_IMAGE GROUP BY PRD_SN ) picked ON picked.PRD_SN = pi.PRD_SN AND picked.SORT_KEY = CASE WHEN pi.PRD_IMG_RPRS_YN = 'Y' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END * 100000 + pi.PRD_IMG_SORT_NO ) thumb ON thumb.PRD_SN = p.PRD_SN LEFT JOIN ( SELECT AUC_SN, COUNT(*) AS BID_COUNT FROM BID GROUP BY AUC_SN ) bid ON bid.AUC_SN = a.AUC_SN LEFT JOIN ( SELECT PRD_SN, COUNT(*) AS FAVORITE_COUNT FROM PRODUCT_FAVORITE WHERE PRD_FAV_USE_YN = 'Y' GROUP BY PRD_SN ) favorite ON favorite.PRD_SN = p.PRD_SN
WHERE pf.USR_SN = #{userId} AND pf.PRD_FAV_USE_YN = 'Y' AND p.PRD_USE_YN = 'Y' AND p.PRD_STATUS_CD != 'PRDC0004'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO PRODUCT_FAVORITE ( PRD_SN, USR_SN, PRD_FAV_USE_YN, PRD_FAV_REG_ID, PRD_FAV_UPDT_ID ) VALUES ( #{productId}, #{userId}, 'Y', #{actor}, #{actor} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE PRD_FAV_USE_YN = 'Y', PRD_FAV_UPDT_ID = #{actor}, PRD_FAV_UPDT_DT = NOW()
mapper.update: UPDATE PRODUCT_FAVORITE SET PRD_FAV_USE_YN = 'N', PRD_FAV_UPDT_ID = #{actor}, PRD_FAV_UPDT_DT = NOW() WHERE PRD_SN = #{productId} AND USR_SN = #{userId} AND PRD_FAV_USE_YN = 'Y'
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PRODUCT_FAVORITE WHERE PRD_SN = #{productId} AND PRD_FAV_USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT a.AUC_SN AS auctionId, p.PRD_SN AS productId, p.PRD_NM AS title, c.CAT_NM AS categoryName, a.AUC_CUR_AMT AS currentPrice, p.PRD_START_AMT AS startPrice, p.PRD_IBY_AMT AS instantBuyPrice, a.AUC_STATUS_CD AS auctionStatusCode, aucStatus.CMM_NM AS auctionStatusName, p.PRD_TRD_METHOD_CD AS tradeMethodCode, tradeMethod.CMM_NM AS tradeMethodName, a.AUC_START_DT AS startDateTime, a.AUC_END_DT AS endDateTime, COALESCE(bid.BID_COUNT, 0) AS bidCount, COALESCE(favorite.FAVORITE_COUNT, 0) AS favoriteCount, p.PRD_VIEW_CNT AS viewCount, u.USR_NM AS sellerName, thumb.THUMBNAIL_PATH AS thumbnailPath, pf.PRD_FAV_REG_DT AS favoritedAt
ORDER BY pf.PRD_FAV_REG_DT DESC, pf.PRD_FAV_SN DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT a.AUC_SN AS auctionId, p.PRD_SN AS productId, p.USR_SN AS sellerId, p.PRD_USE_YN AS productUseYn, p.PRD_STATUS_CD AS productStatusCode FROM AUCTION a JOIN PRODUCT p ON p.PRD_SN = a.PRD_SN WHERE a.AUC_SN = #{auctionId}
